Hardware Component File

L47_L43E_Clim

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference L47_L43E_Clim_v15_20100930T101810.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 744
Receive ID 764
Functional Addr 29
Functional Name Climatisation
